title: ErrorItem
description: Represents a grouped error in Bugsnag, which aggregates multiple individual events with the same error class and message.

id.description: The unique identifier of the error.

project_id.description: The identifier of the project this error belongs to.

error_class.description: The class or type of the error (e.g., TypeError, NullPointerException).

message.description: The error message associated with this error group.

context.description: The context in which the error occurred (e.g., controller#action).

severity.description: The severity level of the error.

status.description: The current status of the error.

events.description: The total number of events for this error.

users.description: The total number of unique users affected by this error.

first_seen.description: The date and time the error was first seen.

last_seen.description: The date and time the error was last seen.

first_seen_unfiltered.description: The unfiltered first seen date and time.

release_stages.description: The release stages in which this error has been seen.

created_at.description: The date and time the error record was created.

events_url.description: The API URL to list events for this error.

html_url.description: The URL to the error on the Bugsnag dashboard.

url.description: The API URL for this error resource.

comment_count.description: The number of comments on this error.

missing_dsyms.description: List of missing debug symbol UUIDs for symbolication.

overrides.description: Override settings applied to this error.

assigned_collaborator_id.description: The ID of the collaborator assigned to this error.
